title: Program shape v1.0
description: Meta-schema for a program shape published under schema/shapes/<shape-id>-vX.Y.yaml or declared locally under lawcode/<jur>/_shapes/<shape-id>.yaml. Per ADR-015, a shape declares the contract that a program manifest must satisfy: which rule_types are allowed, which are required, what outcome the engine produces, and which evaluator module implements the shape-specific post-processing. The shape catalog is the contribution surface for adopters who want to fork GovOps for a new legal tradition.

shape_id.description: Lowercase shape identifier. Manifests reference this in their `shape` field.

version.description: Semver. Major bumps require an ADR; manifests pin to a specific major version.

description.description: Plain-language one-paragraph summary. Audience: program leaders reading the shape catalog.

rule_types_allowed.description: Which RuleType enum values may appear in a manifest declaring this shape. Manifests using other rule types fail validation at load time.

required_rules.description: Rule types that MUST be present in any manifest declaring this shape. A manifest missing one of these fails validation.

outcome_shape.description: Which ShapeOutcome variant the evaluator produces. The base ProgramEngine uses this to know how to render the program's recommendation in audit packages and UI surfaces.

evaluator_module.description: Python import path of the evaluator (e.g. 'govops.shapes.old_age_pension'). Required for published shapes; optional for local shapes that opt out of post-processing.

evaluator_class.description: Class name within the evaluator module that implements the ShapeEvaluator protocol. Defaults to the title-cased shape_id + 'Evaluator'.

references.description: Free-form list of references — ADRs, charter sections, external statutory traditions this shape models. Audience: contributors evaluating whether to fork or extend.
